subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast addressed me as 'Abdu'l-Bahá in the title of thy book! How wondrous is this title, so resplendent, so radiant and so eloquent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من خاطبنی بعبدالبهاء فی عنوان کتابه یا حبذا هذا العنوان اللائح المشرق البلیغ فی ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
